entries.title:
This course includeds the following topic(s): Math Lessons: Grade 1, Math Games: Grades 1-8

About Math Lessons: Grade 1
Discover mathematical concepts using manipulatives. Learn strategies and build agility through mental math. RightStart A Primary Skill Focus: Number Sense, Addition and Subtraction, Place Value

About Math Games: Grades 1-8
Practice and learn math facts through games.

entries.content:
Math Lessons: Grade 1
All students should take the placement test on the RightStart website (rightstartmath.com). Some students may be able to skip RightStart A.
